summary: An FBI FD-302 report describes an interview with a soldier who, along with four others at Fort Carson in early February 2022, observed a motionless, matte white, oval or bean-shaped object hovering over a saddle in Cheyenne Mountain for 3-5 minutes before it vanished. The witness noted the object had intersecting lines forming an abstract polygon pattern and reported no sound, later stating he was contacted by AARO in 2024 but never formally interviewed.
